backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the Premium Lounge AI backend with user profile management, member CRUD, face-hash-based verification simulation, and entry log recording, all protected by role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping each UI feature (navigation, hero, face detection, AI processing, etc.) to their source files, component dependencies, and test IDs for build verification.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and contents of each component, hook, and config file.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, border, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'PremiumLounge AI' and mounting the React root via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all eight page sections (Hero, Face Detection, AI Processing, Verification, Member Management, Entry Logs, System Status) along with the Navigation and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AccessConfirmati: Access confirmation section that renders a green authorized card or red denied card based on the verification result prop, displaying passenger name, membership tier, and an appropriate message.
frontend/src/components/AIProcessingSect: Three-step AI workflow section that cycles through Capturing Image, Extracting Facial Features, and Matching Member Database steps with animated active/completed state styling and a desktop connector line.
frontend/src/components/EntryLogsSection: Displays a paginated, sorted audit table of lounge entry verification logs fetched via `useGetEntryLogs`, showing timestamp, passenger, confidence, and granted/denied result with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/components/FaceDetectionSec: Renders a static 'Live Entry' section with a simulated camera feed UI featuring face-detection corner brackets, scanning animations, and descriptive feature cards.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the PremiumLounge AI brand, copyright year, a caffeine.ai attribution link, and compliance/technology badges.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background lounge image, headline, CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to relevant sections, and three stat indicators (security, speed, members).
frontend/src/components/MemberManagement: Provides a two-panel layout for viewing existing members (with tier badges) and adding new members via a form that calls `useAddMember`, with loading skeletons and inline validation.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar that highlights the active section on scroll and supports smooth-scroll anchor links, with a responsive mobile horizontal scroll fallback.
frontend/src/components/SystemStatusSect: Displays a real-time system health dashboard with status indicators for six components (face engine, database, camera, network, blockchain, activity monitor) and a refresh button that updates the last-checked timestamp.
frontend/src/components/VerificationResu: Renders an identity verification UI where users can input a face hash, trigger a simulated backend verification, and view the resulting match details including member info and verification time.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, handling both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) cases and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, identity persistence, and exposing status flags via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching members, adding a member, simulating face verification, and fetching entry logs against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind with a premium warm-ivory-and-gold light theme via CSS custom properties, and defines utility classes and keyframe animations used throughout the app.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those values via sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and accordion keyframe animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing a Premium Airport Lounge Face Recognition Entry System, listing existing features, image requirements, architectural notes, and versioning metadata.
